payload.title: RBI keeps liquidity tight
payload.raw_text: RBI commentary highlighted inflation vigilance. Repo rate guidance may influence bond yield and NIFTY movement in India.

payload.title: Oil rises
payload.raw_text: Crude oil prices climbed this week and economists warned of imported inflation risk for India.

payload.title: NIFTY closes lower
payload.raw_text: NIFTY fell amid concerns that bond yield and inflation could remain elevated after RBI communication.

payload.title: India CPI annual inflation update
payload.text: Annual CPI inflation eased but remained above comfort levels.

payload.title: RBI policy corridor change
payload.text: Policy stance remained vigilant while liquidity operations tightened by 25 basis points.

payload.title: NIFTY volatility spike
payload.text: NIFTY 50 dropped as yields rose and energy prices stayed elevated.
